title: Understanding the 80/20 Rule in Wealth Creation

segments.text: Most results come from a small fraction of effort.
And this principle can transform your approach.
Focus on high-impact actions for true progress.
Identify the 20% that drives your financial gains.
Remember, less can lead to more when done right.
Follow for the money mindset they never taught you.

description: Efforts should be focused for maximum impact. Follow for the money mindset they never taught you. 💡
